content: react-i18next (i18next v23+, react-i18next v15+) is the recommended choice for this project. Bundle: ~22 kB gzipped (i18next 15 kB + react-i18next 7 kB). react-intl is ~13-18 kB gzipped. LinguiJS is ~3 kB gzipped but requires compile step and macro setup. For a 2-language offline app with Polish (4 plural forms) and English, react-i18next handles Polish pluralization correctly via _one/_few/_many/_other key suffixes mapped to Unicode CLDR plural rules. All translations can be bundled at build time (no lazy loading required). react-i18next wins on ecosystem size, tutorials, and flexibility. LinguiJS wins on bundle size but adds toolchain complexity. For a small app, the extra toolchain overhead of LinguiJS is not worth ~15 kB savings.
